2026-04-14T07:41:01.7427477Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (2075 chars):
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7428371Z ---
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7428900Z description: |
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7429547Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7430682Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7435968Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7436610Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7436762Z on:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7437099Z   push:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7437451Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7437878Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7438141Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7438311Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7438584Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7438745Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7438983Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7439143Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7439547Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7440054Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7440428Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7440774Z   noop:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7441389Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7441834Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7442191Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7442917Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7443784Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7444290Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7444779Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7445358Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7445763Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7446174Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7446585Z       steps:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7446988Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7447573Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7448105Z           env:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7448783Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7449639Z           with:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7450013Z             script: |
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7450572Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7452899Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7453706Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7454449Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7454875Z               }
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7455106Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7455682Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7456545Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7457160Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7457697Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7458729Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7459744Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7461156Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7461891Z               }
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7462118Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7462608Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7463296Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7463808Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7552380Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7553216Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }

2026-04-14T07:41:01.7607928Z

2026-04-14T07:41:01.7608334Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7610466Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7611387Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7612870Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7628467Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7628891Z   noop:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7629313Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7630436Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7630840Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7631806Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7632702Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7633185Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7633678Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7634252Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7634655Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7635082Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7635497Z       steps:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7635898Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7636597Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7637135Z           env:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7637830Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7638697Z           with:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7639076Z             script: |
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7639656Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7640423Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7641381Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7642407Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7642820Z               }
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7643060Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7643326Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7644219Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7644863Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7645404Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7646438Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7647453Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7648638Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7649362Z               }
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7649591Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7649902Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7650582Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7651275Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7651893Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7652424Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7675519Z               });
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7676626Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7677190Z 
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7677338Z tools:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7677706Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7678064Z   github:
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7678440Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7678766Z

2026-04-14T07:41:01.7679609Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7680423Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T07:41:01.7728559Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
